matches.x: The captivity of Israel for their sins. EJOICH not, O Israel, for joy, as other people; for thou hast gone a whoring from thy God, thou hast loved a reward upon every cornfloor.

AND I WILL TAKE SICKNESS AWAY FROM THE MIDST OF THEE. That is to say, through them [the bread and water that I will bless], I will free you from disease, for when your food and drink are good and healthy, they do not cause sicknesses but, on the contrary, heal you. And He states437Verse 26. furthermore that there will not be amongst you a woman that miscarries, a miscarrying womb438Hosea 9:14.…
